faithful_note: Spin kernel faithful: headless photo probe Angle 0.5/1.0/2.0 -> 38.57/34.25/30.46 dB (K=arcPx/6.0 optimal). Center X/Y WIRED (nestedParam, headless-verified to track blur centre), Mix=blend. Embedded-sweep DIVERGED (~14-19) is (a) shared polar-resample discretization (~24 dB all-edges ceiling) and (b) transition-timing frames (A->B fade / drop-zone completion), NOT spin math.
